TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Mswati_III, title = Mswati_III, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mswati_III} }

S.FORM: = Mswati III = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 4 jiyax 19 ka Mswati III ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Swaziland ta sayang o kiya ka Mswati III, pnaah hngkawas 1986 idas 4 jiyax 25 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = mswati iii = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka mswati iii ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan swa*iland ta sajaŋ o kija ka mswati iii, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Mswati III = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 4 jiyax 19 ka Mswati III ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Swaziland ta sayang o kiya ka Mswati III, pnaah hngkawas 1986 idas 4 jiyax 25 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = mswati iii = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka mswati iii ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan swa*iland ta sajaŋ o kija ka mswati iii, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
